hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd resource/frontend && npx eslint "$filepath" --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd resource/frontend && npx tsc -b --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -30; fi
